title: Rockstar reveals Grand Theft Auto VI cover and opens pre-orders
summary: Pre-orders for the game will begin on June 25, while the official cover generates major media and stock market buzz.

title: Epic Games announces overhaul of its store and Unreal Engine 6 with focus on AI
summary: The company details the rebuilding of its launcher and an Unreal Engine 6 focused on interconnection, leading Vampire Survivors to reconsider its collaboration.

title: Warren Spector's studio OtherSide lays off 17 employees and cancels its new game
summary: OtherSide Entertainment cancels Argos: Riders on the Storm and carries out layoffs after the launch of Thick as Thieves.

title: Valve releases SteamOS 3.8 with support for new Steam Machines
summary: The SteamOS update includes compatibility with hardware for future Steam Machines, while demand for the Steam Controller soars.

title: Jim Carrey returns as the Grinch in sequel to the Christmas classic
summary: The Grinch 2: Saving Christmas is announced for multiple platforms, with Jim Carrey reprising his iconic role 25 years later.

title: New 4K images show the nighttime splendor of Vice City in GTA 6
summary: Rockstar releases new screenshots and a clip revealing the vibrant nighttime atmosphere of the city, increasing anticipation for the game.

title: MSI presents a $1,800 gaming laptop and warns of a tough year
summary: The company announces a high-priced device and anticipates a complicated economic outlook for the video game industry.

title: Citizen Sleeper, the acclaimed narrative RPG, is free on the Epic Games Store
summary: The sci-fi game with 93% positive reviews on Steam is available for free for a limited time.

title: System Shock remake was completed thanks to unpaid effort by its developers
summary: The game's co-director reveals that the team continued work on their own after running out of funds midway through development.

title: Palworld firmly positions itself against generative artificial intelligence
summary: The developer of the popular survival game states that players reject generative AI in the industry.

title: Digimon Story: Time Stranger gets a big free update in July
summary: The update adds a Terriermon assistant and new graphical options, coinciding with the Nintendo Switch release.

title: Shinobi: Art of Vengeance confirms its release date for Nintendo Switch 2
summary: The return of the classic action series will take place on September 24 on Nintendo's new console.

title: Pokémon Pokopia updates and announces the Wish Upon a Jirachi event
summary: The game receives patch 1.1.1 and prepares a special event featuring the mythical Pokémon Jirachi.

title: Trump and the White House join the viral wave of the GTA 6 cover
summary: Both Donald Trump and the official White House account use the Grand Theft Auto VI cover in their posts.

title: Fortnite hints at a collaboration with Sonic and debuts content in its new season
summary: Leaks point to a collaboration with Sonic, while Season 3 of Chapter 7 adds Galaxy Sprites.

title: Marathon suffers massive loot farming and theories emerge about the shutdown of Destiny 2
summary: Marathon players accumulate weeks of rewards in days, while speculation grows about the bleak future of both Bungie titles.

title: Dave the Diver: In the Jungle is now available with reviews and full guides
summary: The new tropical expansion of the successful fishing simulator receives extensive media coverage and detailed guides on its gameplay.

title: Forza Horizon 6 debuts new missions and a summer treasure hunt
summary: The driving game receives content updates including the Blast from the Past mission and a seasonal event.

title: Warframe: new guides and details on Protoframe development
summary: New gameplay guides and an interview with the studio cover recent content and character relationships in the title.

title: The curious rules that GTA covers have followed for 25 years
summary: Only one of the saga's covers shows the titular crime, a tradition that GTA 6 continues according to expert analysis.
